name: company-brain-os
description: Free, local, deterministic knowledge base for AI agents. 443 facts, instant cache (122x speedup), intent routing, fact verification. MIT license.
author: CertainLogic <anton@certainlogic.ai>

commands.name: install
commands.description: Install Company Brain as standalone knowledge base. Starts API on localhost:8000.

commands.name: health
commands.description: Check Brain health — facts loaded, cache status, query performance

post_install_note: Brain API starts automatically. Visit http://localhost:8000/health to verify. Run 'python3 cache_warmer.py' to pre-warm.

deterministic_knowledge.description: 443 verified facts. Zero hallucination. Every answer backed by stored knowledge.

instant_on_cache.description: Cold queries: 974ms. Warm queries: 8ms. 122x speedup with zero API cost on repeat.

intent_routing.description: 4-category intent classification (strategy/product/data/operations). Routes queries to right knowledge tier.

local_first.description: Runs on your machine. PGLite backend. No cloud dependency. No API keys required.
